name: eigenai-audio
description: Generate speech and transcribe audio using EigenAI API. Supports text-to-speech (TTS) with multiple models (Higgs Audio, ChatterBox, Qwen3 TTS) and speech-to-text (ASR) with Whisper V3 Turbo. Features voice cloning, multilingual support, and streaming.
author: Bin Sheng <supercarl87@gmail.com>
